diagrams.title: Try-Catch Block
diagrams.description: A diagram showing the try-catch block and how it is used to handle exceptions.
diagrams.purpose: To illustrate the concept of try-catch blocks and how they are used to handle exceptions.

diagrams.title: Error Handling Mechanism
diagrams.description: A diagram showing the error handling mechanism and how it is used to handle exceptions and errors.
diagrams.purpose: To illustrate the concept of error handling mechanism and how it is used to handle exceptions and errors.
